title: Create Aeronautics X Copper Old Stuffs
description: Makes the Create Aeronautics copper textures reflect the old create ones
body:
# Create Aeronautics X Copper Old Stuffs!
If you use the Create Copper Old Stuffs or a similar pack to bring back that vibrant shiny copper but think Create Aeronautics should have the same vibrant copper, well than this pack is targetted towards you! Changes several Create Aeronautics copper palletes to the legacy copper!
![The retextured items!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f7abbd6ae276c6c24e03e036b418bee4ef263db.png)
